Nova Clicker

Nova Clicker is an online idle game which starts you off with a single, smiley Nova, its name is FreezeNova. A simple tap or click on FreezeNova produces your first handful of stars. But don't be fooled, this clicker game quickly grows beyond basic tapping. Soon, you'll be managing an entire universe of quirky characters and powerful upgrades, all designed to make you the ultimate star tycoon.

Play Nova Clicker Online

Loading game...
About Nova Clicker

Nova Clicker is an online idle game which starts you off with a single, smiley Nova, its name is FreezeNova. A simple tap or click on FreezeNova produces your first handful of stars. But don't be fooled, this clicker game quickly grows beyond basic tapping. Soon, you'll be managing an entire universe of quirky characters and powerful upgrades, all designed to make you the ultimate star tycoon. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Nova Clicker in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Clicker game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Nova Clicker for free?

Yes. Nova Clicker is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Nova Clicker?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
